---
title: "Diagonal vs Full Covariance HMM Analysis"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
library(tidyverse)
library(depmixS4)
library(clue)
library(patchwork)
library(corrplot)
})
```

```{r}
params <- list(
dt   = 0.02,
T    = 20,
seed = 11L,
tau_cmd      = 0.15,
cmd_proc_std = 0.005,
m = 1.0, c = 0.4, k = 4.0, plant_proc_std = 0.04,
tau_sa = 0.08, sa_meas_std = 0.03, sa_bias = 0.0,
tau_sb = 0.25, sb_meas_std = 0.02, sb_bias = 0.01,
alpha = 0.6, w1 = 1.0, w2 = 0.2,
train_frac = 0.5, na_cmd = 1L, nb_cmd = 1L,
na_plant = 2L, nb_plant = 2L,
na_sens  = 1L, nb_sens  = 1L,
K = 4
)

schedule <- tibble::tribble(
~regime,        ~t_start, ~t_end,
"Nominal",         0.0,      5.0,
"SensorNoisy",     5.0,     10.0,
"DynamicsOff",    10.0,     14.5,
"Drift",          14.5,     params$T
)

regime_order <- c("Nominal", "SensorNoisy", "DynamicsOff", "Drift")
```

```{r}
make_u_cmd <- function(n, amp = 1.0, dt = 0.02) {
t <- (0:(n-1)) * dt
u <- 0.6 * sin(2*pi*0.25*t) + 0.4 * sign(sin(2*pi*0.05*t))
step_every <- as.integer(2.5/dt)
for (i in seq(1, n, by = step_every)) u[i:n] <- u[i:n] + 0.2 * rnorm(1)
amp * u
}

lpf_first_order <- function(u, tau, dt, proc_std = 0.0) {
n <- length(u); y <- numeric(n)
a <- exp(-dt / max(tau, 1e-6))
for (k in 2:n) y[k] <- a*y[k-1] + (1 - a)*u[k-1] + proc_std*rnorm(1)
y
}

plant_msd <- function(u, dt, m, c, k, proc_std = 0.0) {
n <- length(u); x <- numeric(n); v <- numeric(n)
for (kk in 2:n) {
  acc <- (u[kk-1] - c*v[kk-1] - k*x[kk-1]) / m + proc_std*rnorm(1)
  v[kk] <- v[kk-1] + dt*acc
  x[kk] <- x[kk-1] + dt*v[kk-1]
}
list(pos = x, vel = v)
}

sensor_first_order <- function(xpos, dt, tau, meas_std = 0.0, bias = 0.0) {
y <- lpf_first_order(xpos, tau, dt, 0)
y + bias + rnorm(length(y), sd = meas_std)
}

fit_arx <- function(y, u, na, nb) {
stopifnot(length(y) == length(u))
kmax <- length(y); p <- max(na, nb)
if (kmax <= p) stop("ARX series too short.")
rows <- vector("list", kmax - p); Tvec <- numeric(kmax - p)
for (k in (p+1):kmax) {
  phi <- c(sapply(1:na, function(i) y[k-i]),
           sapply(1:nb, function(j) u[k-j]))
  rows[[k - p]] <- phi
  Tvec[k - p]  <- y[k]
}
Phi   <- do.call(rbind, rows)
theta <- as.numeric(solve(t(Phi) %*% Phi, t(Phi) %*% Tvec))
list(theta = theta, na = na, nb = nb)
}

sim_arx <- function(u, y_seed, model) {
na <- model$na; nb <- model$nb; theta <- model$theta
n <- length(u); yhat <- numeric(n)
stopifnot(length(y_seed) >= na)
yhat[1:na] <- tail(y_seed, na)
p <- max(na, nb)
for (k in (p+1):n) {
  phi <- c(sapply(1:na, function(i) yhat[k-i]),
           sapply(1:nb, function(j) u[k-j]))
  yhat[k] <- sum(theta * phi)
}
yhat
}

simulate_with_faults <- function(params, schedule) {
set.seed(params$seed)
n <- as.integer(params$T/params$dt)
t <- (0:(n-1)) * params$dt
u_cmd <- make_u_cmd(n, dt = params$dt)
u_act_P <- lpf_first_order(u_cmd, params$tau_cmd, params$dt, params$cmd_proc_std)
pl      <- plant_msd(u_act_P, params$dt, params$m, params$c, params$k, params$plant_proc_std)
x_pos_P <- pl$pos; x_vel_P <- pl$vel
yA_P    <- sensor_first_order(x_pos_P, params$dt, params$tau_sa, params$sa_meas_std, params$sa_bias)
yB_P    <- sensor_first_order(x_pos_P, params$dt, params$tau_sb, params$sb_meas_std, params$sb_bias)
y_fused_P <- params$alpha*yA_P + (1 - params$alpha)*yB_P
z_P <- params$w1*x_pos_P + params$w2*x_vel_P
split <- as.integer(params$train_frac * n)
arx_cmd   <- fit_arx(u_act_P[1:split], u_cmd[1:split],     params$na_cmd,   params$nb_cmd)
arx_plant <- fit_arx(x_pos_P[1:split], u_act_P[1:split],   params$na_plant, params$nb_plant)
arx_sa    <- fit_arx(yA_P[1:split],    x_pos_P[1:split],   params$na_sens,  params$nb_sens)
arx_sb    <- fit_arx(yB_P[1:split],    x_pos_P[1:split],   params$na_sens,  params$nb_sens)
u_act_A <- sim_arx(u_cmd,   y_seed = u_act_P[1:params$na_cmd],   arx_cmd)
xpos_A  <- sim_arx(u_act_A, y_seed = x_pos_P[1:params$na_plant], arx_plant)
xvel_A  <- c(0, diff(xpos_A)/params$dt)
yA_A    <- sim_arx(xpos_A, y_seed = yA_P[1:params$na_sens],     arx_sa)
yB_A    <- sim_arx(xpos_A, y_seed = yB_P[1:params$na_sens],     arx_sb)
y_fused_A <- params$alpha*yA_A + (1 - params$alpha)*yB_A
z_A <- params$w1*xpos_A + params$w2*xvel_A
regime_by_t <- rep("Nominal", n)
for (r in seq_len(nrow(schedule))) {
  idx <- which(t >= schedule$t_start[r] & t < schedule$t_end[r])
  regime_by_t[idx] <- schedule$regime[r]
}
x_pos_A_fault <- xpos_A; yA_A_fault <- yA_A; yB_A_fault <- yB_A
for (k in seq_len(n)) {
  reg <- regime_by_t[k]
  if (reg == "SensorNoisy") {
    yA_A_fault[k] <- yA_A_fault[k] + rnorm(1, 0, 0.06)
    yB_A_fault[k] <- yB_A_fault[k] + rnorm(1, 0, 0.05)
  } else if (reg == "DynamicsOff") {
    x_pos_A_fault[k] <- 0.8 * x_pos_A_fault[k]
  } else if (reg == "Drift") {
    yA_A_fault[k] <- yA_A_fault[k] + 0.0007 * (k-1)
  }
}
y_fused_A_fault <- params$alpha*yA_A_fault + (1 - params$alpha)*yB_A_fault
z_A_fault <- params$w1*x_pos_A_fault + params$w2*c(0, diff(x_pos_A_fault)/params$dt)
E <- tibble::tibble(t = t,
  e0 = u_act_A - u_act_P, e1 = x_pos_A_fault - x_pos_P,
  e2a = yA_A_fault - yA_P, e2b = yB_A_fault - yB_P,
  e3 = y_fused_A_fault - y_fused_P, e4 = z_A_fault - z_P)
list(E = E, t = t, regime_t = regime_by_t)
}

hungarian_map <- function(vpath, gt_regime, regime_order) {
tab <- table(State = vpath, Regime = gt_regime)
C <- as.matrix(tab)
nr <- nrow(C); nc <- ncol(C)
if (nr > nc) C <- cbind(C, matrix(0, nrow = nr, ncol = nr - nc))
if (nc > nr) C <- rbind(C, matrix(0, nrow = nc - nr, ncol = nc))
perm_full <- clue::solve_LSAP(max(C) - C)
regime_names <- c(colnames(tab), rep("<pad>", ncol(C) - ncol(tab)))
map_regimes <- regime_names[perm_full][seq_len(nrow(tab))]
names(map_regimes) <- rownames(tab)
map_regimes[as.character(vpath)]
}

compute_accuracy <- function(detected, gt_regime, regime_order) {
gt_f <- factor(gt_regime, levels = regime_order)
pred_f <- factor(detected, levels = regime_order)
conf <- table(Predicted = pred_f, Actual = gt_f)
sum(diag(conf)) / sum(conf)
}

fit_hmm_multistart <- function(Ez, K, fams, n_starts = 5) {
best_ll <- -Inf; best_fm <- NULL
for (r in 1:n_starts) {
  mod <- depmix(response = lapply(names(Ez), function(nm) as.formula(paste0(nm, "~ 1"))),
                data = Ez, nstates = K, family = fams)
  fm_try <- tryCatch(fit(mod, verbose = FALSE), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (!is.null(fm_try) && logLik(fm_try) > best_ll) {
    best_ll <- logLik(fm_try); best_fm <- fm_try
  }
}
best_fm
}
```

```{r}
sim <- simulate_with_faults(params, schedule)
E   <- sim$E
t   <- sim$t
gt  <- tibble::tibble(t = t, regime = sim$regime_t)

raw_channels <- E %>% dplyr::select(e0, e1, e2a, e2b, e3, e4)

feat <- E %>%
dplyr::transmute(t,
  e0 = e0, e1 = e1, e2a = e2a, e2b = e2b, e3 = e3, e4 = e4,
  e_abs_sum = abs(e0)+abs(e1)+abs(e2a)+abs(e2b)+abs(e3)+abs(e4),
  e_rms = sqrt((e0^2+e1^2+e2a^2+e2b^2+e3^2+e4^2)/6),
  e1_diff = c(0, diff(e1)),
  e3_diff = c(0, diff(e3))
) %>%
dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(-t, ~ as.numeric(scale(.x))))
```

## 1. Cross-Channel Correlation Structure

```{r fig.width=8, fig.height=7}
R_global <- cor(raw_channels)
cat("Global cross-channel correlation matrix:\n")
print(round(R_global, 3))

corrplot(R_global, method = "color", type = "upper",
         addCoef.col = "black", number.cex = 0.9,
         tl.col = "black", tl.cex = 1.1,
         title = "Global Cross-Channel Correlations",
         mar = c(0,0,2,0))
```

```{r fig.width=12, fig.height=8}
par(mfrow = c(2, 2), mar = c(2, 2, 3, 1))
for (reg in regime_order) {
  idx <- which(gt$regime == reg)
  R_reg <- cor(raw_channels[idx, ])
  corrplot(R_reg, method = "color", type = "upper",
           addCoef.col = "black", number.cex = 0.8,
           tl.col = "black", tl.cex = 0.9,
           title = reg, mar = c(0,0,2,0))
}
```

```{r}
cat("Within-regime correlation summaries (mean absolute off-diagonal):\n\n")
for (reg in regime_order) {
  idx <- which(gt$regime == reg)
  R_reg <- cor(raw_channels[idx, ])
  off_diag <- R_reg[upper.tri(R_reg)]
  cat(sprintf("  %s: mean |r| = %.3f, max |r| = %.3f\n",
              reg, mean(abs(off_diag)), max(abs(off_diag))))
}
```

## 2. PCA Whitening (Diagonal on PCA = Full Covariance in Original Space)

```{r}
feat_matrix <- feat %>% dplyr::select(-t) %>% as.matrix()
pca_fit <- prcomp(feat_matrix, center = TRUE, scale. = FALSE)

cat("PCA variance explained:\n")
var_exp <- summary(pca_fit)$importance[2,]
cum_var <- summary(pca_fit)$importance[3,]
for (i in 1:length(var_exp)) {
  cat(sprintf("  PC%d: %.1f%% (cumulative: %.1f%%)\n", i, var_exp[i]*100, cum_var[i]*100))
}

feat_pca <- as.data.frame(pca_fit$x)
feat_pca_z <- as.data.frame(lapply(feat_pca, scale))

cat("\nCorrelation of PCA-transformed features (should be ~0 off-diagonal):\n")
R_pca <- cor(feat_pca_z)
cat(sprintf("  Mean |off-diagonal r|: %.6f\n", mean(abs(R_pca[upper.tri(R_pca)]))))
```

## 3. BIC Comparison: Diagonal (Original) vs Full Covariance (PCA-Whitened)

```{r}
K_range <- 2:9

Ez_diag <- feat %>% dplyr::select(-t) %>% as.data.frame()
fams_diag <- rep(list(gaussian()), ncol(Ez_diag))

fams_pca <- rep(list(gaussian()), ncol(feat_pca_z))

bic_diag <- numeric(length(K_range))
bic_full <- numeric(length(K_range))

for (i in seq_along(K_range)) {
  K <- K_range[i]

  fm_d <- fit_hmm_multistart(Ez_diag, K, fams_diag, n_starts = 5)
  if (!is.null(fm_d)) bic_diag[i] <- BIC(fm_d) else bic_diag[i] <- NA

  fm_f <- fit_hmm_multistart(feat_pca_z, K, fams_pca, n_starts = 5)
  if (!is.null(fm_f)) bic_full[i] <- BIC(fm_f) else bic_full[i] <- NA

  cat(sprintf("K=%d  BIC_diagonal=%.1f  BIC_fullcov=%.1f\n", K,
              ifelse(is.na(bic_diag[i]), NA, bic_diag[i]),
              ifelse(is.na(bic_full[i]), NA, bic_full[i])))
}
```

```{r fig.width=10, fig.height=5}
bic_df <- tibble(
  K = rep(K_range, 2),
  BIC = c(bic_diag, bic_full),
  Model = rep(c("Diagonal (original)", "Full covariance (PCA)"), each = length(K_range))
) %>% dplyr::filter(!is.na(BIC))

ggplot(bic_df, aes(x = K, y = BIC, color = Model, shape = Model)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Diagonal (original)" = "#2d5a7b", "Full covariance (PCA)" = "darkred")) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = K_range) +
  labs(title = "BIC vs Number of States: Diagonal vs Full Covariance",
       x = "Number of HMM States (K)", y = "BIC") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

cat(sprintf("\nBIC-optimal K (diagonal):       %d\n", K_range[which.min(bic_diag)]))
cat(sprintf("BIC-optimal K (full covariance): %d\n", K_range[which.min(bic_full)]))
```

## 4. Classification Accuracy at K=4: Diagonal vs Full Covariance

```{r}
fm_diag_4 <- fit_hmm_multistart(Ez_diag, 4, fams_diag, n_starts = 10)
vpath_diag <- viterbi(fm_diag_4)$state
detected_diag <- hungarian_map(vpath_diag, gt$regime, regime_order)
acc_diag <- compute_accuracy(detected_diag, gt$regime, regime_order)

fm_full_4 <- fit_hmm_multistart(feat_pca_z, 4, fams_pca, n_starts = 10)
vpath_full <- viterbi(fm_full_4)$state
detected_full <- hungarian_map(vpath_full, gt$regime, regime_order)
acc_full <- compute_accuracy(detected_full, gt$regime, regime_order)

cat(sprintf("Classification accuracy at K=4:\n"))
cat(sprintf("  Diagonal covariance:     %.1f%%\n", acc_diag * 100))
cat(sprintf("  Full covariance (PCA):   %.1f%%\n", acc_full * 100))
cat(sprintf("  Difference:              %+.1f%%\n", (acc_full - acc_diag) * 100))
```

```{r fig.width=12, fig.height=5}
conf_diag <- table(
  Predicted = factor(detected_diag, levels = regime_order),
  Actual = factor(gt$regime, levels = regime_order))
conf_full <- table(
  Predicted = factor(detected_full, levels = regime_order),
  Actual = factor(gt$regime, levels = regime_order))

make_conf_df <- function(conf, label) {
  df <- as.data.frame(conf)
  names(df) <- c("Predicted", "Actual", "Count")
  df %>%
    dplyr::group_by(Actual) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(Percentage = Count / sum(Count) * 100) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup() %>%
    dplyr::mutate(Model = label)
}

conf_both <- bind_rows(make_conf_df(conf_diag, "Diagonal"),
                       make_conf_df(conf_full, "Full Covariance (PCA)"))

ggplot(conf_both, aes(x = Actual, y = Predicted, fill = Percentage)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", size = 1) +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%d\n(%.1f%%)", Count, Percentage)),
            color = "white", fontface = "bold", size = 3.5) +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "#547792", high = "#1a3a52", limits = c(0, 100)) +
  facet_wrap(~ Model) +
  labs(title = "Confusion Matrices: Diagonal vs Full Covariance",
       x = "Actual Regime", y = "Predicted Regime", fill = "% of Actual") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        panel.grid = element_blank())
```

## 5. Per-Regime Agreement Between Models

```{r}
agreement_by_regime <- tibble(
  t = t,
  regime = gt$regime,
  diag_pred = detected_diag,
  full_pred = detected_full,
  both_correct = (detected_diag == gt$regime) & (detected_full == gt$regime),
  diag_only = (detected_diag == gt$regime) & (detected_full != gt$regime),
  full_only = (detected_diag != gt$regime) & (detected_full == gt$regime),
  both_wrong = (detected_diag != gt$regime) & (detected_full != gt$regime)
)

cat("Per-regime breakdown:\n\n")
agreement_by_regime %>%
  dplyr::group_by(regime) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n = n(),
    both_correct_pct = mean(both_correct) * 100,
    diag_only_pct = mean(diag_only) * 100,
    full_only_pct = mean(full_only) * 100,
    both_wrong_pct = mean(both_wrong) * 100,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  print()
```

```{r fig.width=10, fig.height=5}
regime_colors <- c('Nominal' = 'darkgreen', 'SensorNoisy' = 'darkorange',
                   'DynamicsOff' = 'darkred', 'Drift' = 'navy')

plot_ts <- tibble(t = t, regime = gt$regime,
                  Diagonal = detected_diag == gt$regime,
                  `Full Covariance` = detected_full == gt$regime) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(cols = c(Diagonal, `Full Covariance`),
                      names_to = "Model", values_to = "Correct")

ggplot(plot_ts, aes(x = t, y = Model)) +
  geom_rect(data = schedule,
            aes(xmin = t_start, xmax = t_end, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf, fill = regime),
            inherit.aes = FALSE, alpha = 0.15) +
  geom_point(aes(color = Correct), size = 0.3, alpha = 0.7) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = regime_colors) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c('TRUE' = 'green3', 'FALSE' = 'red')) +
  labs(title = "Classification Correctness: Diagonal vs Full Covariance",
       x = "Time (s)", fill = "Ground Truth", color = "Correct") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank())
```
